That Counseling Place

We don’t fix or repair.
We counsel. You heal.

Please reach out if you are in need of support to make life changes or to address needs that you currently have. Our time together can be brief or extended. We believe that the therapeutic relationship is the foundation for true healing and as such offer an open, genuine, and authentic style of therapy.

About Me

Finances

Cost per Session: Up to $190
Sliding Scale: Yes

Insurances Accepted:

  • Anthem
  • Aetna
  • Aetna Better Health of VA
  • Cigna
  • Humana
  • Magellan Complete Care of VA
  • Magellan (DMAS)
  • Optima/Sentara
  • Palmetto (VA Medicare)
  • Tricare
  • Virginia Premier
  • United HealthCare (Optum)

We offer telehealth sessions! You can have therapy from the comfort of your own home, or anywhere else you choose. Meet your therapist from a place that allows you to solely focus on healing. We can help you move closer to your life’s goals. Contact us to schedule your initial session today!

DIAL NOW

540-944-4994

Mail us

selina@thatcounselingplace.com

Openness

Authenticity

Genuine Care

Empathy

The body heals with play, the mind heals with laughter and the spirit heals with joy

Proverb
